title: Propose-Taxonomy Output (SP13 T-5)
description: Output of skills/infer-vault-structure/propose-taxonomy.sh. Consumes T-4 cluster-output (cluster-output/1) plus the Stage 1 IR; emits per-cluster candidate proposals with explicit type enumeration (project | reference | meeting | unclassified) and pass-orchestration metadata. Consumed by SP13 T-6 import-plan.sh. Resolves spec L165 carry-forward (per-candidate schema declared explicitly before T-6 consumes).

schema_version.description: Schema version anchor. Bump on breaking shape changes; T-6 import-plan.sh checks this before consuming.

llm_mode.description: Whether the LLM passes ran against the live Anthropic Messages API or against the deterministic stub. Hermetic tests force stub; runtime defaults to auto (live when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set).

embedding_mode_input.description: Echoed from the input cluster-output.json so downstream stages know whether the upstream embedding was high-quality or stub.

n_records.description: Total IR records considered (echoed from cluster-output.n_records).

n_clusters_input.description: Cluster count from upstream cluster-output (excludes the unclassified bucket).

passes.description: Per-pass orchestration log. At minimum 2 entries (pass 1 initial; pass 2 outlier re-pass with merge/split). Optional pass 3 fires only if items_mapped_pct < 0.80 after pass 2.

model.description: Anthropic model id used for this pass (e.g., claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 for pass 1, claude-sonnet-4-6 for pass 2). 'stub' when running in stub mode.

merge_split_ops.description: Pass 2+ only. Surface merge/split decisions for downstream T-7 review-gate explanation.

n_passes.description: Number of LLM passes actually run. Minimum 2 enforced by spec L162.

items_mapped_pct.description: Fraction of n_records mapped to a non-unclassified candidate after the final pass. Drives optional pass-3 trigger (< 0.80).

candidates.description: Per-candidate taxonomy proposals. Every IR record routes to exactly one candidate (a candidate of type 'unclassified' is the terminal disposition for items the LLM cannot place).

candidate_id.description: Stable candidate id. p0001..p9999 for typed candidates; the literal 'unclassified' for the terminal pile.

label.description: Short human-readable label proposed by the LLM (or derived from cluster keywords in stub mode). Used as the heading in T-6 import-plan.md.

type.description: Candidate type. Non-project types are explicitly enumerated per spec L169 — never silently dropped. Drives Stage 3 routing: project → PRD/Context/Updates triad; reference → reference doc; meeting → meeting note; unclassified → Inbox/.

proposed_path.description: Vault-relative path for the candidate (e.g., 'Engagements/X', 'References/policies', 'Meetings/2026-Q2'). Empty string for unclassified.

metadata.description: Per-candidate metadata. Free-form by type; T-6 import-plan generator renders into YAML blocks. T-8 PRD/Context/Updates generator consumes for project candidates.

source_items.description: IR records routed to this candidate. Echoed from cluster-output members; preserves path + source_hash for downstream idempotency.

confidence.description: Heuristic confidence: fraction of source_items whose origin cluster fully mapped to this candidate (vs. cross-cluster spillover). NOT LLM self-reported. Untrusted self-report rejected per spec L170 design question 4.

low_confidence.description: True when confidence < 0.5. Surfaces for downstream T-7 user merge/split.

small_corpus_input.description: Echoed from cluster-output. True when upstream short-circuited to single-cluster small-corpus mode.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings surfaced during pass orchestration (e.g., pass 3 triggered, low cumulative mapping).
